title: Indola
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''indola''', also known as the '''Sabretoothed Tree Sloth''' were tree-dwelling predators native to the planet [[Dar'Or]]. Their favorite prey was young [[Ri'Dar]]. A single indola could wipe out the young of an entire Ri'Dar warren, though the adults could usually escape by flying away. Indola had tough skins and a high pain tolerance, easily able to resist to the primitive arrows and spears of the Ri'Dar.

Some [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] attracted to Dar'Or to poach [[elix]] also took indola away with them to sell to animal trainers.
